tools.name: fullHashes.safebrowsingFullHashesFind
tools.description: Finds the full hashes that match the requested hash prefixes.

tools.name: threatHits.safebrowsingThreatHitsCreate
tools.description: Reports a Safe Browsing threat list hit to Google. Only projects with TRUSTED_REPORTER visibility can use this method.

tools.name: threatLists.safebrowsingThreatListsList
tools.description: Lists the Safe Browsing threat lists available for download.

tools.name: threatListUpdates.safebrowsingThreatListUpdatesFetch
tools.description: Fetches the most recent threat list updates. A client can request updates for multiple lists at once.

tools.name: threatMatches.safebrowsingThreatMatchesFind
tools.description: Finds the threat entries that match the Safe Browsing lists.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
